patterns.name: FastAPI Application
patterns.template:
from fastapi import FastAPI, Depends, HTTPException, status
from fastapi.middleware.cors import CORSMiddleware

app = FastAPI(
	title="$TITLE",
	description="$DESCRIPTION",
	version="1.0.0",
)

app.add_middleware(
	CORSMiddleware,
	allow_origins=["*"],
	allow_credentials=True,
	allow_methods=["*"],
	allow_headers=["*"],
)

patterns.name: Pydantic BaseModel
patterns.template:
from pydantic import BaseModel, Field, ConfigDict
from typing import Optional

class $NAME(BaseModel):
	"""$DOCSTRING"""
	$FIELD: $TYPE = Field(..., description="$DESCRIPTION")
	$FIELD2: Optional[$TYPE2] = Field(default=None, description="$DESCRIPTION2")
	
	model_config = ConfigDict(from_attributes=True)

patterns.name: Dependency Injection
patterns.template:
from fastapi import Depends
from typing import Annotated

async def get_$NAME($PARAMS) -> $RETURN_TYPE:
	"""$DOCSTRING"""
	$BODY
	return $RESOURCE

$NAMEDep = Annotated[$RETURN_TYPE, Depends(get_$NAME)]

patterns.name: Database Session Dependency
patterns.template:
from fastapi import Depends
from sqlalchemy.orm import Session
from typing import Generator, Annotated
from .database import SessionLocal

def get_db() -> Generator[Session, None, None]:
	db = SessionLocal()
	try:
		yield db
	finally:
		db.close()

DbSession = Annotated[Session, Depends(get_db)]

patterns.name: APIRouter
patterns.template:
from fastapi import APIRouter, Depends, HTTPException, status
from typing import List
from . import schemas, crud
from .database import DbSession

router = APIRouter(
	prefix="/$PREFIX",
	tags=["$TAG"],
	responses={404: {"description": "Not found"}},
)

@router.get("/", response_model=List[schemas.$RESPONSE_MODEL])
async def list_$NAME(db: DbSession, skip: int = 0, limit: int = 100):
	return crud.get_$NAME(db, skip=skip, limit=limit)

@router.get("/{$ID}", response_model=schemas.$RESPONSE_MODEL)
async def get_$NAME(db: DbSession, $ID: int):
	item = crud.get_$NAME_by_id(db, $ID)
	if item is None:
		raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="$NAME not found")
	return item

patterns.name: Background Task
patterns.template:
from fastapi import BackgroundTasks
import logging

logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)

def $TASK_NAME($PARAMS) -> None:
	logger.info(f"Starting task: $TASK_NAME")
	$BODY
	logger.info(f"Completed task: $TASK_NAME")

@app.post("/$PATH")
async def $ENDPOINT(background_tasks: BackgroundTasks, $PARAMS):
	background_tasks.add_task($TASK_NAME, $TASK_PARAMS)
	return {"message": "Task scheduled"}

patterns.name: WebSocket Endpoint
Exception Handler
Custom Middleware
patterns.template:
from fastapi import Request
from starlette.middleware.base import BaseHTTPMiddleware
from starlette.responses import Response
import time

class $NAMEMiddleware(BaseHTTPMiddleware):
	async def dispatch(self, request: Request, call_next) -> Response:
		start_time = time.time()
		$BEFORE
		
		response = await call_next(request)
		
		process_time = time.time() - start_time
		response.headers["X-Process-Time"] = str(process_time)
		$AFTER
		
		return response

app.add_middleware($NAMEMiddleware)

patterns.name: SQLAlchemy Model
patterns.template:
from sqlalchemy import Column, Integer, String, DateTime, ForeignKey
from sqlalchemy.orm import relationship
from sqlalchemy.sql import func
from .database import Base

class $NAME(Base):
	__tablename__ = "$TABLE_NAME"
	
	id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True, index=True)
	$FIELD = Column($COLUMN_TYPE, nullable=$NULLABLE)
	created_at = Column(DateTime(timezone=True), server_default=func.now())
	updated_at = Column(DateTime(timezone=True), onupdate=func.now())
	
	$RELATED = relationship("$RELATED_MODEL", back_populates="$BACK_POPULATES")

patterns.name: CRUD Operations
Database Setup
patterns.template:
from sqlalchemy import create_engine
from sqlalchemy.ext.declarative import declarative_base
from sqlalchemy.orm import sessionmaker

DATABASE_URL = "$DATABASE_URL"

engine = create_engine(DATABASE_URL)
SessionLocal = sessionmaker(autocommit=False, autoflush=False, bind=engine)
Base = declarative_base()

def create_tables():
	Base.metadata.create_all(bind=engine)
